description:
This multiple-choice quiz tests your knowledge of JavaScript ECMAScript versions from ES2015 to ES2022. It is designed for intermediate to advanced developers with a playful, encouraging tone. The quiz requires no login and challenges you to distinguish features across these ES releases.
Topics: JavaScript, ECMAScript 2015 (ES6), ECMAScript 2022, ES version features
Audience: JavaScript developers familiar with ES6+ and modern ECMAScript features
